ETLDelphi 0.1.0

    • delphi100k: Source Data and OMOP CDM Mapping
    • Delphi to OMOP CDM ETL: Workflow and Design Decisions

    • run_etl: Detailed Steps and Mechanics

    Run the Delphi to OMOP CDM ETL

    run_etl.Rd

    Executes all ETL SQL scripts in order: admin -> stage -> keys -> vocab -> cdm_core -> cdm_clinical -> cdm_derived -> qc.

    run_etl(
  con,
  config_path = NULL,
  config = NULL,
  sql_dir = NULL,
  dry_run = FALSE,
  from_step = NULL,
  to_step = NULL
)

    Arguments

    con

    DBI connection to DuckDB (source and CDM must exist in DB).

    config_path

    Path to config YAML; if NULL, uses package default.

    config

    List override; if provided, config_path is ignored.

    sql_dir

    Path to inst/sql; if NULL, uses system.file("sql", package = "ETLDelphi").

    dry_run

    If TRUE, only list SQL files that would run.

    from_step

    Optional: start from this step (e.g. "40_cdm_core").

    to_step

    Optional: stop after this step.

    Value

    Invisible result from run_sql_scripts.

    Contents

    Developed by Adam Black.
